lists.title: PGA / LPGA host venues
lists.subtitle: Courses with explicit PGA or LPGA event history in the stored catalog
lists.description: A weekly generated list of venues where the source data explicitly says PGA or LPGA Tour history exists.
criteriaSummary: Requires an explicit PGA / LPGA host flag in the stored catalog
Ranks by tour-history type first, then venue scale and metadata completeness
lists.rationale: This list exists because tour-history metadata is one of the strongest trustworthy editorial signals currently stored in the catalog.

lists.title: Top 36-hole courses
lists.subtitle: Large-format venues with at least 36 holes in the stored catalog
lists.description: A weekly list for multi-course destinations and large facilities, ranked conservatively using venue scale plus other trustworthy metadata.
criteriaSummary: Requires 36 or more holes in the stored catalog
Ranks by venue scale first, then metadata completeness and confidence; tour-host history does not drive this list and is capped in the final selection
lists.rationale: This recipe surfaces larger golf destinations without pretending the catalog has full reviewer or pricing data.

lists.title: Top private courses
lists.subtitle: Weekly private-club ranking from the stored catalog
lists.description: A deterministic private-course list built from trusted structural metadata rather than fake consumer engagement signals.
criteriaSummary: Only includes private courses from the stored catalog
Ranks within private courses using venue scale, metadata completeness, and confidence; tour history is not a primary signal here and is capped in the final selection
lists.rationale: This recipe gives GolfeR a deterministic editorial view for private course discovery without inventing user sentiment.

lists.title: Best resort courses
lists.subtitle: Weekly resort-course ranking from the stored catalog
lists.description: A weekly resort-course list using travel-ready metadata, venue scale, and confidence to keep the ranking explainable.
criteriaSummary: Only includes resort courses from the stored catalog
Ranks by travel-ready metadata, venue scale, and confidence, with only a light tour-history bonus and a cap on host-venue overrepresentation
lists.rationale: This recipe gives GolfeR a deterministic editorial view for resort course discovery without inventing user sentiment.

lists.title: Best courses in Washington
lists.subtitle: Weekly state spotlight for Washington
lists.description: A deterministic weekly ranking for Washington built from venue scale, metadata completeness, and catalog confidence within that state only.
criteriaSummary: Only includes stored catalog courses in Washington
Ranks by venue scale, metadata completeness, and confidence, with only a small secondary bonus for explicit tour history
lists.rationale: This state recipe exists to keep weekly location-based editorial lists easy to expand one state at a time without letting one global score dominate every geography.

lists.title: Best public courses in Arizona
lists.subtitle: Weekly public-course spotlight for Arizona
lists.description: A weekly Arizona public-course list ranked using only signals the stored catalog can actually support.
criteriaSummary: Only includes Arizona public courses
Ranks by venue scale, public-discovery metadata, and confidence within Arizona's public-course set, with host venues capped as a secondary factor
lists.rationale: Arizona public golf is a high-interest discovery slice, and the stored catalog has enough coverage there to support a weekly editorial list.

lists.title: Best courses in Scottsdale
lists.subtitle: Weekly city spotlight for Scottsdale, Arizona

criteriaSummary: Only includes courses in Scottsdale
Ranks by venue scale, city-level discovery metadata, and confidence rather than a global cross-list score, with host venues capped as a secondary factor
lists.rationale: This city recipe is a v1 proof point that the generator can expand beyond state-based lists when the catalog has enough local density.

lists.title: Bucket-list courses
lists.subtitle: High-signal destinations assembled from the strongest metadata in the catalog
lists.description: A weekly editorial mix of tour hosts, large-format venues, and resort destinations, built from explicit catalog signals instead of subjective reviews.
criteriaSummary: Includes tour hosts, resort courses, and venues with at least 36 holes
Ranks by tour history, venue scale, resort/private status, confidence level, and metadata completeness
lists.rationale: This is GolfeR's first broad editorial list: a deterministic bucket-list mix built only from the strongest trusted metadata signals currently available.
